_meta.prompts: control.PROBE_PROMPTS — batches 1-2 used prompts 1-8; batch 3+ uses all 16
_meta.pairing: index i in every arm is prompt i; arms within a batch are item-paired
_meta.note: batch 1 of sonnet/haiku was first collected 2026-07-20; sonnet batch 2 same day

verdict.rule: paired signed-rank + equivalence, per-item geo-mean across batches

batch3_16items.low: ARRAYS LOST — the launch pipe's tail -6 truncated the safety print; verdict JSON below is self-contained

verdict.evidence: batch 3 standalone affirms equivalence (median 0.934, CI hi 1.088 < 1.25, n=16); batch 1+2 pooled was inconclusive (median 1.058, CI hi 1.384); median ratios across batches 1.19 -> 1.04 -> 0.93 oscillate around 1.0, while sonnet-5's sit at 1.8-2.0
verdict.agreement: matches the Models API capability read (claude-haiku-4-5 exposes no effort parameter) — behavioral and declarative evidence arrived independently
verdict.gate: task-3 gate CLOSED 2026-07-20: the haiku no-op reproduced from live token distributions with no hardcoded table
